>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - APP支付（普通服务商）文档索引

> APP 支付为商户提供移动端 APP 内的微信支付能力，用户在商户 APP 中唤起微信完成支付后返回该应用，适用于电商、游戏、生活服务等各类独立 APP 的支付场景。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080227.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080245.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080246.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080228.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020803687.md)

## API 列表
- [APP下单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080231.md)
- [APP调起支付](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080233.md)
- [微信支付订单号查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080234.md)
- [商户订单号查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080235.md)
- [关闭订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080236.md)
- [支付成功回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080237.md)
- [申请退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080238.md)
- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080239.md)
- [发起异常退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080240.md)
- [退款结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080241.md)
- [申请所有/单个子商户交易账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080242.md)
- [申请服务商资金账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080243.md)
- [下载账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080230.md)

## 请求示例
- [APP下单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080231-curl.md)
- [APP下单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080231-java.md)
- [APP下单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080231-go.md)
- [关闭订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080236-curl.md)
- [关闭订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080236-java.md)
- [关闭订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080236-go.md)
- [发起异常退款 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080240-curl.md)
- [发起异常退款 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080240-java.md)
- [发起异常退款 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080240-go.md)
- [商户订单号查询订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080235-curl.md)
- [商户订单号查询订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080235-java.md)
- [商户订单号查询订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080235-go.md)
- [微信支付订单号查询订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080234-curl.md)
- [微信支付订单号查询订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080234-java.md)
- [微信支付订单号查询订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080234-go.md)
- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号） - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080239-curl.md)
- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号） - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080239-java.md)
- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号） - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080239-go.md)
- [申请所有/单个子商户交易账单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080242-curl.md)
- [申请所有/单个子商户交易账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080242-java.md)
- [申请所有/单个子商户交易账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080242-go.md)
- [申请服务商资金账单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080243-curl.md)
- [申请服务商资金账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080243-java.md)
- [申请服务商资金账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080243-go.md)
- [申请退款 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080238-curl.md)
- [申请退款 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080238-java.md)
- [申请退款 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4013080238-go.md)
